summary: Full backend + frontend test for PureBreeze MVP. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases pass against live ingress URL — health, /api/quote/analyze (split_system, ducted, commercial, window, data:URL prefix, lead persistence), /api/contact (full+minimal+422 validation+persistence), /api/leads/quotes & /api/leads/contacts (no _id leakage). Gemini 3 Flash vision via emergentintegrations works; quote leads persist to MongoDB quote_leads, contact submissions to contact_leads. Frontend: landing page renders all sections, all data-testids present, AI Quote upload->preview->AI result flow works (returned valid structured QuoteAnalyzeResponse), contact form submits and shows success toast.

issues: 'Scan My AC Now' pill button has muted grey text on light grey background atop a red banner — contrast looks slightly low; consider solid white bg + dark text or white text

action_items: (Optional / minor) Improve contrast on ScaryFacts CTA pill button.
(Optional) Synthetic test image was rated Clean (dirtiness=0) by Gemini — expected since it's not a real photo. For real-user QA, use real dirty AC photos.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is defined AFTER routes use logger.exception (line 195 vs 283). NameError would only surface inside the except branch of /api/quote/analyze; tests didn't trigger LLM failure so it didn't fire — should move logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger() above api_router definition.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in current FastAPI — switch to lifespan handler (non-blocking).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Synthetic AC-like JPEG written to /tmp/ac.jpg with real visual features (slats, dust speckles, grime patch). TEST_-prefixed leads written to MongoDB during tests (kept for traceability).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_purebreeze_api.py is reusable. It expects /tmp/ac.jpg (regenerate via PIL if missing). Backend uses LlmChat with model 'gemini-3-flash-preview' — emergentintegrations is installed and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is in /app/backend/.env.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The latent logger ordering bug in server.py is dormant because the LLM call succeeded in all tests; would fail loudly on first real Gemini exception.
